# Sai Sujan S

## About
Sai Sujan S is a full-stack developer focused on building fast, accessible, and conversion-driven web experiences for startups, brands, and e-commerce products.

## Skills
- React.js
- Next.js
- Node.js
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- MongoDB
- E-commerce platforms

## Experience Highlights
- Built and shipped modern web applications with performance and SEO in mind.
- Specialized in scalable frontend architecture and polished user interfaces.
- Delivered e-commerce solutions with strong product and conversion considerations.
